channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Quordle Hints And Answers For Wednesday, February 25
item.description: Looking for some help with today’s Quordle words? Some hints and the answers are right here to give you a hand.

item.title: The AI leadership reckoning is here
item.description: Your CEO is in danger and generational change is afoot.

item.title: ‘It’s going to be painful for a lot of people’: Software engineers could go extinct this year, says Claude Code creator
item.description: Boris Cherny says Claude Code has been writing all of his code since November.

item.title: Self-defense company finds major benefits after moving manufacturing from overseas to US
item.description: Byrna Technologies CEO Bryan Ganz moved manufacturing from South Africa to Indiana before President Donald Trump's tariffs, saying the company "correc...

item.title: Anthropic claims 3 Chinese companies ripped it off, using its AI tools to train their models: ‘How the turn tables’
item.description: Anthropic, which settled a copyright claim by thousands of authors for $1.5 billion months ago, claims the Chinese firms used "distillation" technique...

item.title: AMD Expands Meta AI Partnership With A Massive 6 Gigawatt GPU Win
item.description: Initial deployments are scheduled to begin in 2H 2026, employing custom MI450-class GPUs optimized specifically for Meta’s AI training and inference w...

item.title: A Fictional Memo Just Moved Real Markets. Here’s Why It Matters.
item.description: A Fictional Memo Just Moved Real Markets. Here’s Why It Matters.

item.title: FedEx sues Trump administration for full tariff refunds after Supreme Court ruling on IEEPA
item.description: FedEx sues U.S. government for tariff refunds after Supreme Court ruled Trump's emergency trade duties on imports were unlawful.

item.title: Steve Jobs adopted a no ‘bozos’ policy and said the best managers are those who never wanted the job—here are his 3 best management tips
item.description: Hiring only for “professional management” doesn’t work, Steve Jobs said.

item.title: ‘ARC Raiders’ Patch Notes: Stitcher, Wolfpack And Other Nerfs, Plus Beards And Pianos In ‘Shrouded Sky’ Update
item.description: Nerfs to popular guns like the Stitcher, Venator and Kettle along with crafting changes for the Wolfpack and other grenades, should prove controversia...

item.title: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy says sucking up to your boss won’t earn their trust
item.description: Want to earn the trust of your boss and peers? Sucking up to them won’t do the trick, says Amazon’s CEO Andy Jassy.

item.title: ‘Paradise’ Season 2 Reveals It’s Going Somewhere Completely Insane
item.description: Paradise has taken a hard left turn into a totally different kind of sci-i as of its three episode season 2 premiere.

item.title: FedEx lawsuit vs. Trump administration kicks off war over tariff refunds
Struggling with income-tax questions? Sign up now for Don’t Short Yourself Live.
Consumers are less pessimistic about the U.S. economy than previously thought
Economic calendar: Home-price and consumer-confidence data incoming
Claude developer Anthropic’s much-anticipated AI event under way — live updates
Florida Chamber CEO says high-tax states are in a ‘death spiral’ as $4M-an-hour wealth migration accelerates
item.description: If Florida was a stock, the state's Chamber of Commerce CEO Mark Wilson "would be investing everything" in it as he details the Sunshine State's plans...

item.title: Trump Organization signs deal for billion-dollar skyscraper on Australia's Gold Coast
item.description: The Trump Organization announced a $1 billion project in Australia last week, building a 91-floor luxury resort and apartments on the Gold Coast.

item.title: American homebuyers gain most purchasing power since 2022
item.description: Homebuyers' purchasing power rose over $30,300 in past year as median-income households can now afford $331,483 homes with mortgage payments 8.4% lowe...

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
